title: Fix auth prompt bar showing incorrect 'dismissed' state

requirements.text: Fix the AuthPromptBar so it never displays a 'Sign in was dismissed' message unexpectedly. The bar should only show a dismissal state when the user has explicitly closed it during the current session, and must reset correctly when a new protected action is triggered.

quotes: why does it wright their sign in was dismised??

acceptanceCriteria: Opening the app or performing a protected action does not show a 'dismissed' message unless the user actually dismissed the bar in the same session.
Triggering a new protected action after a previous dismissal re-shows the prompt bar in its default (non-dismissed) state.
The dismissed state is reset when the user navigates away or a new auth prompt is triggered.
No stale dismissed state persists across page reloads or new sessions.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Redesigning the AuthPromptBar appearance or animation.
